title: Better WeatherDisplay
description: This small resource pack improves the textures from the WeatherDisplay mod.
body:
This small resource pack improves the textures from the **WeatherDisplay** mod!

### IMPORTANT!!!

**This recource pack requires the [WeatherDisplay](https://modrinth.com/mod/weatherdisplay) mod by [Rickjeh](https://modrinth.com/user/Rickjeh)!!**
